title: hibbertia exponens
intro: Hibbertia exponens, also known as the Yellow Buttons plant, is a small, shrubby species of flowering plant native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and rosacea due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Hibbertia exponens is often prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a tea, infusion, or topical cream, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
